title: MinecountriesPack
description: Official modpack for Minecountries, containing optimisations and QoL mods, while preserving vanilla compatibility.
body:
MinecountriesPack is developed for [Minecountries](https://minecountries.com) and is aimed to improve experience on vanilla survival servers.

It's based on Fabric (although this may change in the future). It includes following features:
- Performance improvement and optimisation
- Graphics improvement (includes several shader- and resourcepacks)
- Server QoL mods like Voicechat

Please note that this modpack is still in beta, and you may encounter some errors, and not all planned functionality is added as well. Report any problems to [our discord channel](https://discord.com/channels/1082312210698731570/1196858035423948910).

Credits:
- [SuperBetterGrass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/super-better-grass) by dimadencep based on [LambdaBetterGrass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lambdabettergrass) by LambdAurora
- Vanilla Tweaks Essential&Aesthetic resourcepacks by [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
- Sound Physics Remastered by [henkelmax](https://github.com/henkelmax/sound-physics-remastered)
